violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as raw eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as various packaged foods and beverages) in the retail cooler. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated eggs to bottom shelf. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

The sink used for food preparation and ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024
Allergen statement lacking on current preview menu. PIC must ensure regular menu includes allergen statement prior to opening date. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
